svg.title: Crash Detection App – Structured Plan
svg.desc: Architecture plan showing 4 main screens and the data pipeline for the crash detection mobile app

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Home / Ride screen of the crash detection app')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Devices panel in the crash detection app')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Ride history screen in the crash detection app')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Profile / Medical screen in the crash detection app')
sendPrompt('What sensors does the crash detection app collect data from?')
sendPrompt('What does the Application layer do in the crash detection app?')
sendPrompt('How does rule-based crash detection work?')
sendPrompt('What does the AI engine do in the crash detection app?')
sendPrompt('What does the Backend API server do in the crash detection app?')
sendPrompt('What does the hospital frontend show in the crash detection system?')
sendPrompt('What does the police station frontend show in the crash detection system?')
sendPrompt('How should the device management panel work in the crash detection app?')
sendPrompt('How should Bluetooth pairing work in the crash detection app?')
sendPrompt('What should the device status indicators show in the crash detection app?')

g.text: Higher quality sensor data from helmet hardware → more accurate AI scoring & crash classification
